rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption has no relation to Elec. Code §62.011, which governs election instruction posters at polling places. No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 62.011. INSTRUCTION POSTER. (a) An election officer shall post an instruction poster:
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict identified.
